name: HEREDITARY SPHEROCYTOSIS

demographics.Age: anemia begins in early infancy to late adulthood

dominant_finding: bone changes rare (← mild anemia); long bones rarely affected
discriminating_features: bone changes rare (← mild anemia); long bones rarely affected
widening of diploe with displacement + thinning of outer table
improvement in skeletal changes following splenectomy

general: bone changes rare (← mild anemia); long bones rarely affected
widening of diploe with displacement + thinning of outer table
improvement in skeletal changes following splenectomy

clinical.Rx: splenectomy corrects anemia even though spherocytemia persists
